title: AgentThreadBreadcrumbCache
description: Redis hot-read cache of the most recent breadcrumbs for an agent thread. Postgres (agent_remote_dev_breadcrumbs) is the durable source of truth; this cache is short-TTL and rebuilt on miss. Used by dev-server to inject <local_thread_log_tail> into prompt context without a full Postgres round trip on every task start.

$dd:redis.summary: Per-thread tail of the postgres-backed breadcrumb stream, cached in Redis for low-latency prompt context injection.

keys.name: AgentThreadBreadcrumbTailKey
keys.description: Redis STRING containing a JSON-encoded AgentThreadBreadcrumbTail snapshot. SET with PX TTL; missing or stale entries trigger a rebuild from agent_remote_dev_breadcrumbs.

AgentThreadBreadcrumb.title: AgentThreadBreadcrumb
AgentThreadBreadcrumb.description: A single breadcrumb entry written by dev-server during task execution. Mirrors the durable agent_remote_dev_breadcrumbs row.

id.description: Postgres bigserial id of the breadcrumb row.

taskId.description: Owning task UUID, if the breadcrumb belongs to a task. Null for session-level breadcrumbs (boot, session-ready).

payload.description: Free-form JSON payload describing the breadcrumb. Producers SHOULD NOT embed secrets; the dev-server scrubs known API key env names before insertion.

emittedAt.description: Wall-clock instant the breadcrumb was emitted by the worker pod.

podName.description: Kubernetes pod that emitted this breadcrumb. Optional.

branch.description: Active git branch when the breadcrumb was emitted. Optional.

provider.description: Active agent provider (e.g. 'cursor-cli', 'codex') when the breadcrumb was emitted. Optional.

AgentThreadBreadcrumbTail.title: AgentThreadBreadcrumbTail
AgentThreadBreadcrumbTail.description: Cached tail of recent breadcrumbs for a thread, ordered newest-first.

threadId.description: Agent dev thread UUID this tail belongs to.

tailMaxItems.description: Hard cap on how many breadcrumbs the cache will hold for this thread; older entries are dropped on rebuild.

items.description: Breadcrumbs ordered by emittedAt DESC (newest first).

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC instant the cache snapshot was built.

source.description: Where the snapshot was rebuilt from, e.g. 'postgres' or 'cache'.
